List.Title: Publications
List.Description: Contains publications and information about them
List.Name: {7E7E6C50-E7B9-4971-AB8E-6DE265E4B701}

Field.Description: (Optional) List of authors (names only) as shown in the article or citation.
Field.Name: AuthorNames

Field.Description: The digital object identifier (DOI) for this publication. Use the URL form (e.g. https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.25669173.v1).
Field.Name: DOI
JournalName
Field.Description: The journal, code repository, database, or primary website where this entry was published.

CHOICES.CHOICE: Child and Adolescent Psychiatry and Mental Health
JAMA: The Journal of the American Medical Association
Journal of Child Psychology and Psychiatry
Journal of Child Psychology and Psychiatry and Allied Disciplines
Journal of Consulting and Clinical Psychology
Journal of Epidemiology and Community Health
Journal of Neurology, Neurosurgery and Psychiatry
Journal of Psychopathology and Clinical Science
Journal of the American Academy of Child & Adolescent Psychiatry
Journal of the American Academy of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry
Journal of the American Chemical Society
Journal of the American College of Cardiology
Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association
Journal of the American Statistical Association
Michigan Journal of Community Service Learning
Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America (PNAS)
The American Journal of Geriatric Psychiatry
The Journal of Clinical Endocrinology & Metabolism

Field.Description: Link to publication. When the publication is found in multiple sources, use the link to the primary source or journal in which it was published.
Field.Name: PublicationLink

Field.Description: Link to the PI (first author) in the People list. The system will attempt to find this when it syncs to Michigan Experts.
Field.Name: PI

Field.Description: Link to author(s) in the People list. The system will attempt to find this when it syncs to Michigan Experts, but it can also be entered manually.
Field.Name: Authors

Field.Description: The ID for this Publication in Michigan Experts (Symplectic Elements or Dimensions), if known. The system will try to fill this based on DOI#.
Field.Name: DimensionsID

Field.Description: (Optional) The PubMed ID (PMID) for this publication, if it is available on PubMed. Enter either the ID only (e.g. 12345678), the abstract URL (e.g. https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12345678).
Field.Name: PubMedID

Field.Description: (Optional) The arxiv.org publication ID, if known. Enter either the ID only (1234.5678v9) or the abstract URL (e.g. https://arxiv.org/abs/1234.5678v9).
Field.Name: ArxivID

Field.Description: Consultations that contributed to this publication.
Field.Name: Consultations

Field.Description: Programs that contributed to this publication.
Field.Name: Programs

Field.Description: Outreach emails or newsletters that featured this publication.
Field.Name: RelatedEmail
TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.

Field.Name: Authors_x003a_UniqName
Field.Description: The UniqNames of authors in the People list. The system will attempt to find this when it syncs to Michigan Experts, but it can also be entered manually.
